items.text: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1
items.fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The GeoFence_singleton component shall establish a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1

items.text: The component shall invoke the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the distanceFromFence variable
items.fragment: The component shall invoke the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the distanceFromFence variable
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall invoke the circleLinearization function from the geofence_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the distanceFromFence variable

items.text: The component shall set the value of the output port timeToRecovery to 1.7
items.fragment: The component shall set the value of the output port timeToRecovery to 1.7
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall set the value of the output port timeToRecovery to 1.7

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the distanceFromFence at the current moment is greater than the distanceFromFence at the previous moment
items.fragment: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds the recovery time, the distanceFromFence at the current moment is greater than the distanceFromFence at the previous moment
